description: A sheet of advanced material, lighter but also sturdier than steel. It's made from a mix of carbon nanotubes and tungsten carbide. It's used extensively in aerosapce, military hardware and bionics due to its biocompatibility, ballistc properties and tensile strength.

A rigid string of advanced material, lighter but also sturdier than steel. It's about the size of a spaghetto, which is a convenient shape for use in 3d printing. It's made from a mix of carbon nanotubes and tungsten carbide. It's used extensively in 3D printing, aerospace, military hardware and bionics due to its biocompatibility, ballistic properties and tensile strength.
